subcodes.first_line: O people of Bahá! Be not grieved by what hath befallen Us, for He hath taken flight in spirit, and We abide amidst sweet fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل البهاء لاتحزنوا علی ما ورد علینا انه طار بالروح و نحن اذا فی ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
